content.title: Strategy · Data · Delivery
content.subtitle: Hover any pillar for the verb. Click to expand the case.

expand.title: Data
expand.body: Schemas you can read, pipelines you can rerun, dashboards your CFO actually opens. Built on the same ER diagram you'll see on slide 5.

expand.title: Delivery
expand.body: Two-week increments, deploy on Friday, demo on the next Monday. We pick the boring stack on purpose so the surprise is the outcome, not the postmortem.

notes: Strategy capsule navigates to slide 50 (parent: 2). The other two expand inline via the shared layoutId card morph — both demos in one slide.
